documentation.description:
This sets a symbol or stack variable to a value.  The first parameter
must evaluate to a symbol, stack variable, or temp symbol.  If it is a
temp symbol, it is converted to a perminant symbol in the symbol table.
The assigned value is the result of evaluating the second parameter.

subprograms.name: local
subprograms.code: procedure local(e : out element_type; s : cons_index; p : phase)

subprograms.name: setq
subprograms.code: procedure setq(e : out element_type; s : cons_index; p : phase)

documentation.description: Define local variables and optionally assign values to them.
